signal: Two dist patches (nested lane #14214 + health-monitor #54782) require manual re-application on every OpenClaw upgrade. No automation existed.
action: Created scripts/apply-dist-patches.sh — idempotent script that finds dist files by content pattern and applies both patches. Updated upgrade checklist step 6 to reference script.

signal: 6 hours spent on 4 rounds of dist patches for upstream dependency bug (discord.js#11419 DAVE). Root cause in Node.js stream internals, not patchable at dist level. Should have stopped after Round 1.
action: Created memory/reference/dist-patch-protocol.md: one-round rule for dependency bugs, decision tree, anti-pattern documentation.
